## redactAPIKey() function

RedactAPIKey returns a redacted version of API keys. The first 8 and last 4 characters are not redacted, everything else is replaced by "\*" characters.

Throws if the provided string has less than 12 characters.

Ported from: profile.go RedactAPIKey function

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function redactAPIKey(apiKey: string): string
```
